name: xmpp-client
description: An XMPP client library for the modern web.

scripts.prosody:setup: cd server && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2 >/dev/null && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2_bind2 >/dev/null && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2_sm >/dev/null && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2_fast >/dev/null
scripts.size: bun run build && bun run bundlesize
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run lint && bun run bundlesize
scripts.ci: bun install && bun run test:unit && bun run lint && bun run server:restart && bun run build && bun run prosody:setup && bun run test:e2e && bun run test:browser && bun run bundlesize
scripts.clean: bun run server:stop ; rm -f server/localhost.key server/localhost.crt server/prosody.err server/prosody.log server/prosody.pid lerna-debug.log ; rm -rf server/modules server/.cache node_modules dist
